case_title: FABIAN CARRERA MORALES VS. PRICILIANO "PICHI" VILLALOBOS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, FABIAN CARRERA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLALOBOS, PRICILIANO "PICHI" AS AN INDIVIDUAL  DBA  PICHI VILLALOBOS CONSTRUCTION $3,398.61 PRINCIPAL, $6.80 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,610.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
